parameters.jsCode:
const d = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { ...d, upsell_opportunity: true, upsell_note: 'High-value job - consider maintenance contract upsell' } }];

const d = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { ...d, upsell_opportunity: false } }];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ type: 'job_complete_summary', job_id: $json.job_id, customer_name: $json.customer_name, job_type: $json.job_type, job_total: $json.job_total, priority: $json.priority, upsell: $json.upsell_opportunity, status: $json.workflow_status, actions: $json.actions_taken }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ type: 'error_alert', channel: '#alerts', text: 'WORKFLOW ERROR - Node: ' + $json.failed_node + ' | Error: ' + $json.error_message + ' | Job: ' + $json.job_id }) }}
